name: Valheim
author: ops@refx.example
description: Iron Gate's Norse survival sandbox dedicated server. SteamCMD-installed with optional BepInEx mod loader support.

installScript.script:
#!/bin/bash
# ReFx steamcmd shim — the steamcmd:debian/proton install image ships no
# `steamcmd` on PATH. Bootstrap SteamCMD and expose it on PATH so the egg's
# `steamcmd ...` calls resolve (otherwise the game server never downloads).
if ! command -v steamcmd >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
  curl -sSL https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz | tar zxf - -C /mnt/server/steamcmd || { echo "ERROR: failed to fetch steamcmd"; exit 1; }
  chmod +x /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh /mnt/server/steamcmd/linux32/steamcmd 2>/dev/null || true
  printf '#!/bin/sh\nexec /mnt/server/steamcmd/steamcmd.sh "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
  chmod +x /usr/local/bin/steamcmd
fi
set -euo pipefail
cd /mnt/server
steamcmd +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login anonymous +app_update 896660 validate +quit
mkdir -p /mnt/server/worlds_local
chmod +x valheim_server.x86_64 || true
echo 'Valheim install complete.'

variables.description: Display name shown in the in-game server browser.
Name of the world save to load or create.
Join password (minimum 5 characters). Required for non-public servers.
1 = listed in the community browser, 0 = join by IP only.

longDescription: Explore, build and conquer the tenth Norse world with friends on a dedicated Valheim server.
